user_feedback: can you make the controls more intuitive, right now its kind of confusing, especially knowing when I select a piece or not, can you fix that and also can you move the cannon a bit lower so that I can see the balls full trajectory? and can you also make it so that level 1 and 2 a re easy, level 3 and 4 are medium difficult, and level 5 - 6 are more difficult (this can be determined by the number of cups and the number of platforms available and number of balls available, make it good, thanks!
analysis:
- Issue identified: 
    1. Controls lack visual feedback, making it hard to distinguish between "selected" and "grabbed" states.
    2. Cannon position at (100, 100) is too high/static, and the user requested it be lower to see trajectory better.
    3. Level difficulty needs to be tiered (Easy: 1-2, Medium: 3-4, Hard: 5-6).
- Files affected: `game.js`, `entities.js`, `levels.js`.
- Changes needed:
    1.  `game.js`: Move cannon to `(80, 200)`. Update UI text to clearly indicate "SELECT MODE" vs "GRAB MODE".
    2.  `entities.js`: Update `Cannon.fire` speed to `12` (to compensate for lower height and ensure playability). Update `MovableObject.render` to show a pulsating yellow outline when selected, and a solid green outline with directional arrows when grabbed.
    3.  `levels.js`: Reconfigure all 6 levels to match the requested difficulty progression and accommodate the new cannon position/physics.
